title: gravesia macrophylla
intro: Gravesia macrophylla, also known as the Grave's senna or Grave's cassia, is a plant species in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Gravesia macrophylla include its ability to regulate bowel movements, relieve constipation, and aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Gravesia macrophylla involve infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and infusions for digestive health.
